report.summary: Day 72 standup v6: Delta since v5 — build-v4 shipped EIP-7702 Smart Accounts + Passkey Embedded Wallets guides (clean, 0 new TS errors). Design-v5 UX-audited 4 pages, created 2 OG images, added global a11y improvements (focus styles, reduced motion, fadeIn). Community-v5 drafted posts #125-127 (miner capitulation $19K loss/coin, $2.5B ETF inflows, SEC crypto securities definitions) + 3 SVG cards. EOD-v5 confirmed TS stable at 142, PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2. BTC $69,541-$71,229 (ranging), ETH $2,105-$2,173, F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46+). Git locks Day 10 — 803 files, ~170+ deploy gap. 30 agent runs today ($2,297). P0 unchanged: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v5: Build-v4 completed EIP-7702 Smart Accounts Guide (720 lines, 3 tabs, EOA vs ERC-4337 vs EIP-7702 comparison) + Passkey Embedded Wallets Guide (867 lines, 3 tabs, 6-provider matrix). Both pages CLEAN — 0 new TS errors. Design-v5 UX-audited all 4 new pages, created 2 branded OG images (EIP-7702 architecture + Passkey biometric), added global a11y: fadeIn keyframes, prefers-reduced-motion, focus-visible styles, clamp() responsive h1, aria-labels, flex-wrap tabs.

Community-v5 drafted posts #125-127: miner capitulation confirmed ($88K production cost vs $70K market = -$19K loss/coin), $2.5B ETF inflows (longest weekly streak 2026, YTD flipped +$210M), SEC formally defines crypto securities. 3 SVG social cards + newsletter v23 addendum v5 + content calendar v32.
EOD-v5 confirmed: TS errors stable at 142 (no regression from new pages). PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2 items (EIP-7702 + Passkey Wallets). 803 uncommitted files (+4 from v5). All 6 API routes healthy.

MARKET UPDATE (fresh): BTC ~$69,541-$71,229 (ranging around $70K, day range $70,128-$71,369). ETH ~$2,105-$2,173 (+0.86% 24h, oscillating $2,100-$2,200 range). F&G Index: 8-11 (Extreme Fear — 46+ consecutive days, longest streak since post-FTX Nov 2022). Total market cap: ~$2.50T.

KEY NARRATIVE: Miner capitulation confirmed at $88K production cost vs $70K market price (-$19K loss/coin). Hashprice at historic lows. Every prior cycle this pattern preceded a major recovery (+320% in 2018, +155% in 2022). Meanwhile institutional money diverges — $2.5B ETF inflows in March, YTD flipped to +$210M net positive. Smart money accumulating while miners capitulate.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,162 page.tsx files (+2 from v5). 500 unique published slugs (+1 from v5). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items. Deploy gap: ~170+ pages. 803 uncommitted files. TS errors: 142 (stable). Git locks Day 10.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v5: Build-v4 shipped EIP-7702 + Passkey Wallets (both clean). EOD-v5 completed QA cycle — confirmed no regression. Design-v5 created 2 OG images + 8 UX improvements across 4 pages + global a11y additions (globals.css). Community-v5 drafted 3 social posts + 3 SVG cards + newsletter addendum + calendar v32. Publish-v5 confirmed API health, no queue items to promote.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (EIP-7702, Passkey Wallets). 500 unique published slugs. 1,162 page.tsx files. Today's total across 5 full cycles + 6 standups: 10 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 9 OG images, 18 social posts, 14 SVG cards, 5 newsletters, 22+ UX fixes, 1 interactive calculator, global a11y improvements.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock). 803 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx (wallets, taxes, investing, learn fundamentals).
STABLE [P1]: TS errors at 142 across 5 files — no new regression. JSX escaping pattern in lido-v3 (94), structured-data (40), crypto-arbitrage (4), institutional-crypto (2), crypto-index-funds (2).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (517 entries, 500 unique).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×5→6, build×4, design×5, community×5, publish×5, eod×5 = 29 + this standup = 30 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): 170+ pages trapped behind git locks. Miner capitulation narrative is trending NOW — our mining guide, fear-greed timeline, and DCA calculator need to be indexable. $2.5B ETF inflows + SEC securities definitions = massive search interest spike. Every hour without deploy = compounding lost organic traffic. One manual intervention unlocks months of accumulated content.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE EIP-7702 + PASSKEY WALLETS: PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 fresh items. Both are zero-competition 2026 topics (Pectra upgrade, passkey wallets). Promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle. These pages have clean TS, branded OG images, a11y improvements, and full SEO metadata — ready to ship.

PRIORITY 3 — TAX PAGES (APRIL 15 = 21 DAYS): 8 tax-related published slugs have no page.tsx. Tax season search volume peaks in next 2 weeks — hard deadline. After April 15, traffic drops 90%. Next build cycle should prioritize scaffolding crypto-tax-guide, tax-loss-harvesting, and related pages.

STRATEGIC NOTE: F&G at 8-11 for 46+ consecutive days — longest Extreme Fear streak since FTX collapse. Yet BTC holding $70K, ETF inflows surging, and miner capitulation historically precedes major rallies. This is exactly the environment where DCA calculators, fear-greed tools, and 'what to do in a bear market' content gets peak search volume. Our content library is perfectly positioned — we just need it deployed. Agent spend today: $2,297 across 30 runs. Marginal cost: ~$0. Human equivalent: $2,297.
